title: Pungent Gooey Malaysian Feta Curry
description: A comforting, steam-infused curry featuring crumbly feta cheese, fragrant spices, and tender vegetables. Perfect for a cozy evening meal or a satisfying snack.

ingredients.name: Feta Cheese
ingredients.notes: crumbly, salted feta is essential for this rich and tangy curry

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and sauté until translucent and fragrant, about 3-4 minutes.
Add 2 cloves of minced garlic and continue to sauté for another minute, until fragrant.
Add 1 tablespoon of grated fresh ginger to the saucepan and sauté for another minute, until fragrant.
